variables.name: Age
variables.description: Age of the participant at the time of collection of their first or only sample, or the age of the participant at a specific interval or visit

variables.name: Age at Diagnosis
variables.description: Age of the participant at the time of diagnosis of their Primary Disease

variables.name: CEA
variables.description: Carcinoembryonic Antigen (ng/mL)

variables.name: Chemotherapy
variables.description: Undergone or undergoing chemotherapy treatment for cancer.

variables.name: Country
variables.description: The country in which the participant was living and from which their sample was collected

variables.name: Gender
variables.description: Participant's gender as Male or Female

variables.name: Primary Disease
variables.description: The main disease(s) for which the participant has been asked to donate a sample for study

variables.name: Race
variables.description: Race using US census definitions

variables.name: Radiation Therapy
variables.description: Undergone or undergoing radiation therapy for cancer

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Unique Participant Identifier

variables.name: Year of Birth
variables.description: Year of birth of participant

variables.name: BSP Notes
variables.description: Comments on tissue from BSP path. Review or additional notes submitted by the collaborator

variables.name: Cancer Stage
variables.description: Stage of Cancer as appropriate for cancer type

variables.name: Fibroblast and Vessel Percent
variables.description: Estimated percent of nucleated cells that consist of fibroblasts and vessels (determined by BSP if tissue sample QC'd, but may be provided by collaborator on samples BSP does not review)

variables.name: Inflammation Percent
variables.description: Estimated percent of nucleated cells that consist of inflammatory cells (determined by BSP if tissue sample QC'd, but may be provided by collaborator on samples BSP does not review)

variables.name: Necrosis Percent
variables.description: Estimated percent of the tissue specimen that is necrotic (relative indicator of specimen quality)

variables.name: SAMPID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID

variables.name: Sample Type
variables.description: Indicates the Tumor / Normal status of a sample

variables.name: Tissue Site
variables.description: General body site where sample was collected

variables.name: Tumor Percent
variables.description: Estimated percent of nucleated cells that consist of tumor cells (determined by BSP if tissue sample QC'd, but may be provided by collaborator on samples BSP does not review)

variables.name: Tumor Type
variables.description: Sample taken from Primary or Secondary/Metastatic tumor

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SAMPID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID
